content.speakerText: All set! Have a great trip!

options.text: Thanks so much! You've been super helpful.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks so much! You've been super helpful.' 表达了真诚感谢并认可对方的帮助，符合道别与感谢场景的礼貌规范。'Thanks!' 虽然语法正确，但过于简单，不符合使用说明中建议的更真诚表达。'Okay, bye.' 和 'I guess that's it.' 缺乏感谢，显得冷漠不礼貌。

content.speakerText: Thank you for helping me with my luggage.

options.text: You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!' 不仅礼貌回应感谢，还主动表达祝福，符合道别与感谢场景的完整表达。'No problem, see you later.' 虽然常见，但缺少感谢回应的温暖感。'I didn't do much.' 和 'Whatever, bye.' 显得消极或不礼貌，不符合积极社交规范。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you taking the time to explain everything.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你花时间向我解释一切。

options.text: It was my pleasure. Take care!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'It was my pleasure. Take care!' 是对深层感谢的优雅回应，既表达乐意帮助，又以祝福结束对话。'Sure thing!' 通常用于回应简单请求，不够正式。'Yeah, okay.' 太随意，缺乏礼貌。'Don't mention it.' 虽然可用，但语气略显冷淡，不如 'It was my pleasure' 真诚温暖。

content.template: I really ______ you for all your help!
content.hint: 表达真诚感谢的高级动词，常用于正式或温暖语境
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（appreciate + 名词/代词）

content.template: Thanks so much! You've been ______ helpful.
content.hint: 口语中加强语气的常用词，常与 'helpful', 'kind', 'nice' 搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（super helpful = 非常有帮助）

content.template: It was my ______. Have a great day!
content.hint: 回应感谢时的经典句型，表达乐意提供帮助
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（It was my pleasure）

content.speakerText: All set! Have a great trip!
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much! You've been super helpful.
Thank you so much for everything — I really appreciate your help!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了感谢并回应了祝福
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者的日常道别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thanks', 'appreciate', 'helpful' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Thank you for helping me find the right gate.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你帮我找到正确的登机口。
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Have a wonderful flight!
It was my pleasure — enjoy your trip!
No problem at all! Safe travels!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应感谢并主动祝福
语言准确性：是否使用正确句型（如 It was my pleasure / You're welcome）
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、不生硬，符合服务场景
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'welcome', 'pleasure', 'enjoy', 'safe travels' 等道别关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you staying late to help me with my booking.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你留下来帮我完成预订。
expectedAnswers: I'm glad I could help! Thanks for your kindness!
It was no trouble at all — have a fantastic trip!
Thank you for saying that! I'm happy to assist anytime.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了深层感谢并传递积极情绪
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的高级表达（如 glad I could help, no trouble at all）
表达自然度：是否避免机械回应，体现情感温度
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'appreciate', 'glad', 'no trouble', 'happy to assist' 等情感词汇
